blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,165 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
